gaps: No test covers the User Guides section under App Settings at all
No test covers device image loading behavior in any list/scrolling context within the app
No test covers pagination or lazy-loading behavior for device lists (e.g., images loading only for first N items)
No test covers scrolling behavior in the User Guides device list to verify images render beyond the initial visible set
No test covers placeholder/fallback UI behavior when device images fail to load

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-001: Verify device images load for all devices in User Guides list after full scroll
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap the hamburger menu (☰) in the top-left corner
Tap 'App Settings'
Scroll down and tap 'User Guides'
Observe the list of devices displayed
Slowly scroll down through the entire device list until the last device is visible
Scroll back up to the top of the list
For each device visible in the list, verify that a device image (thumbnail/icon) is displayed next to the device name
generated_testcases.expected: All devices in the User Guides list display their corresponding device images. No placeholder icons, broken image indicators, or blank spaces appear for any device, including those beyond the initial visible set.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-002: Verify device images load for devices beyond the top 6 after scrolling
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate: hamburger menu (☰) → App Settings → User Guides
Count the number of devices visible on screen without scrolling (initial viewport)
Note the device names and whether images are visible for these top N devices
Scroll down past the initial viewport to reveal devices 7, 8, 9, etc.
For each newly revealed device, observe the device image area
Wait 5 seconds for images to load
Scroll back up and down slowly through the entire list
generated_testcases.expected: Devices beyond the top 6 (i.e., those not visible in the initial viewport) load their device images successfully after scrolling reveals them. No placeholder icons, gray boxes, or broken image symbols are shown for any device.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-003: Verify placeholder/fallback UI when device image fails to load
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate: hamburger menu (☰) → App Settings → User Guides
Identify any device entry that shows a placeholder instead of a device image
If no placeholder is visible, enable Airplane Mode on the phone
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate back to User Guides (hamburger menu → App Settings → User Guides)
Scroll through the entire device list
Observe the image area for each device entry
Disable Airplane Mode and wait 10 seconds
Scroll through the device list again
generated_testcases.expected: When device images fail to load (e.g., due to no network), a proper placeholder/fallback UI element is displayed (e.g., a generic device icon, silhouette, or gray box with a camera/photo icon). The placeholder is visually consistent with the app's design. After network is restored, images load correctly and replace the placeholders.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-004: Verify device images load correctly after app restart and re-scroll
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate: hamburger menu (☰) → App Settings → User Guides
Scroll down to the bottom of the device list
Scroll back up to the top
Verify all device images are loaded
Press the Home button to background the app
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate back: hamburger menu (☰) → App Settings → User Guides
Scroll down to the bottom of the list again
Scroll back up to the top
generated_testcases.expected: After app backgrounding and reopening, all device images in the User Guides list load correctly on re-scroll. No images are missing or replaced by placeholders for any device, including those beyond the initial viewport.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-005: Verify device images load after app force-kill and relaunch
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate: hamburger menu (☰) → App Settings → User Guides
Scroll through the entire device list to trigger image loading
Verify images are displayed for all devices
Force-kill the app (swipe it away from the Recent Apps list)
Relaunch the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate: hamburger menu (☰) → App Settings → User Guides
Immediately scroll to the bottom of the device list without waiting
Observe device images as they appear during scrolling
Scroll back to the top and verify all images
generated_testcases.expected: After a full app restart, device images load successfully for all devices in the User Guides list, including those beyond the initial viewport. Images may load lazily as the user scrolls, but no permanent placeholders or broken images remain after scrolling through the entire list.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-006: Verify device images load correctly after device rotation during scroll
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate: hamburger menu (☰) → App Settings → User Guides
Scroll down approximately halfway through the device list
Rotate the phone to landscape orientation
Observe the device images for visible devices
Scroll to the bottom of the list in landscape mode
Rotate the phone back to portrait orientation
Scroll back to the top of the list
Verify all device images are displayed correctly
generated_testcases.expected: After device rotation, all visible device images in the User Guides list render correctly in both orientations. No images are lost, replaced by placeholders, or misaligned due to the orientation change. Scrolling after rotation loads images for all devices.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-007: Verify device images load for all devices after rapid scrolling
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate: hamburger menu (☰) → App Settings → User Guides
Perform a rapid fling scroll from the top of the device list to the bottom
Immediately perform a rapid fling scroll from the bottom back to the top
Wait 10 seconds for any pending image loads to complete
Slowly scroll through the entire list from top to bottom
For each device entry, check the device image area
generated_testcases.expected: After rapid scrolling, all device images eventually load correctly. No devices show permanent placeholders, broken image icons, or blank spaces. The app does not crash or become unresponsive during rapid scrolling.

generated_testcases.title: TC-UG-008: Verify device images load correctly when switching between User Guides and other app sections
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate: hamburger menu (☰) → App Settings → User Guides
Scroll down to reveal devices beyond the initial viewport
Verify images are loading for visible devices
Tap the hamburger menu (☰) and navigate to a different section (e.g., 'My Devices')
Wait 5 seconds
Navigate back: hamburger menu (☰) → App Settings → User Guides
Scroll through the entire device list
Repeat the navigation away and back 3 times, scrolling through the list each time
generated_testcases.expected: Each time the User Guides section is re-entered, all device images load correctly after scrolling. No cumulative image loading failures occur. The image loading behavior is consistent regardless of how many times the user navigates away and back.
